text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while talking to Yaeno Muteki in my
office...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I've been experiencing throbbing pains on
and off since this morning.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Could it be that these headaches are the result of
insufficient head training?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
When I was a child, I used to train my head by
headbutting trees in the yard. Recently, though,
I've been neglecting such practice...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I must return at once to my headbutt traini—agh! I
won't even be able to do my regular training at
this rate...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I step in to stop Yaeno Muteki from
headbutting anything, her headaches continue for
some time.
